query: I have a research report in markdown at ~/projects/market-analysis/findings.md and I need to make it more readable for our VP of Sales before the board meeting on Friday. Can you polish it up? It's about 3 pages and has a bunch of citations I need to keep.
hey can you rewrite this memo for my boss? its at /tmp/cloud-update.md. she's a C-level exec and hates long paragraphs. needs to be punchy and action-oriented with the key numbers bolded

I need to create a proposal for our client using the FAB framework. The key features are: automated deployment pipeline, 99.9% uptime SLA, and 24/7 support. Budget is $250K annually. Save it to ~/Documents/acme-proposal.md

Ich habe einen deutschen Strategiebericht unter ~/berichte/digitalisierung.md. Kannst du den Text verbessern und für die Geschäftsführung aufbereiten? Bitte alle Quellenangaben und Zitate beibehalten.

take this executive summary at docs/exec-summary.md and restructure it using BLUF - bottom line up front. the current version buries the recommendation in the third paragraph and our CEO won't read past the first one
I just finished a cogni-narrative arc (corporate-visions) at output/why-change-narrative.md. Can you polish the writing while keeping the arc structure intact? It has arc_id in the frontmatter.

we have these power position statements for our sales deck at sales/positions.md with IS/DOES/MEANS structure. can you make the DOES layer more quantitative and strengthen the MEANS with better emotional language?

my blog post draft is at content/ai-trends-2026.md. it's about 1200 words and needs to be more engaging - better opening hook, clearer structure, maybe some rhetorical devices. Target audience is CTOs.
can you apply the McKinsey Pyramid Principle to reorganize this brief? the arguments are all over the place and I need clean MECE groupings. file is at ~/work/quarterly-brief.md
I need to write a one-pager summarizing our product for investors. Key stats: 40% cost reduction, 127 enterprise customers, $4.2M ARR. Should fit on exactly one page with visual elements.
can you create a PowerPoint presentation from my quarterly results data? I have the numbers in a spreadsheet at ~/data/q4-results.xlsx and need about 12 slides with charts
I need to review this pull request on GitHub - it's PR #247 on our main repo. Can you look at the code changes and give me feedback on code quality and potential bugs?
read the PDF at ~/contracts/vendor-agreement.pdf and extract the key terms, payment schedule, and termination clauses into a structured summary
can you help me set up a CI/CD pipeline for our Node.js app? We're using GitHub Actions and want to deploy to AWS ECS on every push to main
I need to analyze the sentiment and key themes across 500 customer support tickets exported as CSV at data/tickets.csv. Give me a breakdown by category with percentages.
help me write a Python script that reads a markdown file, counts word frequency, and generates a readability score. Save it to tools/analyze.py
can you translate this document from English to German? It's our product description at docs/product-overview.md and we need it for the DACH market launch
I want to create an interactive dashboard showing our sales pipeline data. I have the data in a JSON file at api/pipeline.json and want to use React with charts
run a competitive analysis on our three main competitors - Datadog, Splunk, and New Relic. I need pricing comparison, feature matrix, and market positioning
I need to refactor the authentication module in our Express.js backend. The current implementation mixes JWT validation with route handlers and it's getting hard to maintain
